mapper.insert: insert into sensitive_word(word, level, replacement, status, hit_count, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{word}, #{level}, #{replacement}, #{status}, #{hitCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: update sensitive_word set word = #{word}, level = #{level}, replacement = #{replacement}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from sensitive_word where word = #{word} limit 1
select * from sensitive_word where status = 1 order by char_length(word) desc, id desc
mapper.delete:
delete from sensitive_word where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update sensitive_word set hit_count = ifnull(hit_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
